# Loot Tables

## Individual Monster Drops

Roll d100 per defeated enemy.

### Low-Level Enemies (CR 0–4)

| d100 | Loot |
|------|------|
| 01–30 | Nothing |
| 31–60 | d6 copper pieces |
| 61–70 | d6 silver pieces |
| 71–85 | d6 gold pieces |
| 86–95 | Minor consumable (bandage, torch, ration) |
| 96–100 | Uncommon item (see item table) |

### Mid-Level Enemies (CR 5–10)

| d100 | Loot |
|------|------|
| 01–15 | Nothing |
| 16–30 | 2d6 silver pieces |
| 31–55 | 2d6 gold pieces |
| 56–70 | 4d6 gold pieces |
| 71–85 | Consumable (potion, scroll) |
| 86–95 | Uncommon magical item |
| 96–100 | Rare magical item |

### High-Level Enemies (CR 11+)

| d100 | Loot |
|------|------|
| 01–10 | 3d6 gold pieces |
| 11–30 | 6d6 gold pieces |
| 31–50 | 2d6 × 10 gold pieces |
| 51–70 | Rare magical item |
| 71–90 | Very rare magical item + gold |
| 91–100 | Legendary item |

## Treasure Hoards

For discovered hoards, roll multiple times:
1. **Gold**: Level-appropriate gold (d6 × 10 × party level)
2. **Gems** (d4): Each worth d6 × 10 GP
3. **Items** (d3): Roll on appropriate rarity table
4. **Special**: 10% chance of a unique story item related to the campaign

## Magical Item Generation

### Rarity & Power

| Rarity | Typical Level | Value |
|--------|--------------|-------|
| Common | 1+ | 50–100 GP |
| Uncommon | 1+ | 100–500 GP |
| Rare | 5+ | 500–5,000 GP |
| Very Rare | 11+ | 5,000–50,000 GP |
| Legendary | 17+ | 50,000+ GP |

### Item Type (d10)

| d10 | Type |
|-----|------|
| 1 | Weapon |
| 2 | Armor/Shield |
| 3 | Ring |
| 4 | Amulet/Necklace |
| 5 | Cloak/Clothing |
| 6 | Boots/Gloves |
| 7 | Wand/Staff/Rod |
| 8 | Wondrous Item |
| 9 | Potion (superior) |
| 10 | Scroll (high level) |

### Magical Weapon Properties (d8)

| d8 | Property |
|----|----------|
| 1 | +1 to attack and damage |
| 2 | Extra d6 elemental damage (roll element) |
| 3 | Glows when enemies of a type are near |
| 4 | Returns when thrown |
| 5 | Grants advantage on initiative |
| 6 | Heals wielder 1d4 on kill |
| 7 | Can cast a cantrip 3/day |
| 8 | Sentient — has personality and goals |

### Magical Armor Properties (d6)

| d6 | Property |
|----|----------|
| 1 | +1 AC |
| 2 | Resistance to one element |
| 3 | Advantage on stealth (even heavy armor) |
| 4 | Once/long rest: absorb one hit completely |
| 5 | Grants swim speed equal to walk speed |
| 6 | Provides dim light in 10ft radius |

### Wondrous Items

For wondrous items, generate a unique item with:
- An evocative name
- A clear mechanical benefit
- A minor quirk or drawback
- A brief origin story

### Element Table (d6)

| d6 | Element |
|----|---------|
| 1 | Fire |
| 2 | Cold/Ice |
| 3 | Lightning |
| 4 | Poison/Acid |
| 5 | Radiant |
| 6 | Necrotic |

## Cursed Items

5% chance any magical item is **cursed**. The curse isn't apparent until the item is equipped or used.

| d6 | Curse |
|----|-------|
| 1 | Item can't be removed without Remove Curse spell |
| 2 | −2 to a random attribute while attuned |
| 3 | Whispering madness — disadvantage on WIS saves |
| 4 | Item demands blood — 1d4 HP at dawn |
| 5 | Attracts monsters — double random encounter chance |
| 6 | Jealous item — disadvantage with other weapons/armor |

Identifying a curse requires: Arcana check DC 20, or casting Identify (reveals the curse).
